class="text-size-chat leading-[calc(var(--codex-chat-font-size)+8px)] extension:leading-normal mb-1.5" style="box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; margin: 0px 0px 6px; padding: 0px; --tw-leading: 1.5; line-height: 1.5;"><font style="color: light-dark(rgb(187, 190, 191), rgb(255, 255, 255));"><span class="font-semibold" style="box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; font-weight: 600; --tw-font-weight: 600;">FastAPI should probably be labeled <span class="_inlineMarkdown_x0d1c_75 inline-markdown text-size-chat-sm font-mono blend bg-token-text-code-block-background rounded-sm px-1.5 py-0.5 leading-none extension:bg-token-foreground/10 electron:bg-token-list-hover-background/60" style="box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; border-radius: 7.5px; background-color: oklab(0.804634 0.0000367761 0.0000160933 / 0.1); padding-inline: 6px; padding-block: 2px; font-family: Consolas, &quot;Courier New&quot;, monospace; --tw-leading: 1; line-height: 1; font-size: 12px;">Uvicorn + FastAPI</span></span> or <span class="_inlineMarkdown_x0d1c_75 inline-markdown text-size-chat-sm font-mono blend bg-token-text-code-block-background rounded-sm px-1.5 py-0.5 leading-none extension:bg-token-foreground/10 electron:bg-token-list-hover-background/60" style="box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; border-radius: 7.5px; background-color: oklab(0.804634 0.0000367761 0.0000160933 / 0.1); padding-inline: 6px; padding-block: 2px; font-family: Consolas, &quot;Courier New&quot;, monospace; --tw-leading: 1; line-height: 1; font-size: 12px;">matchmaking-api</span>, because Uvicorn is the actual HTTP server listening on <span class="_inlineMarkdown_x0d1c_75 inline-markdown text-size-chat-sm font-mono blend bg-token-text-code-block-background rounded-sm px-1.5 py-0.5 leading-none extension:bg-token-foreground/10 electron:bg-token-list-hover-background/60" style="box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; border-radius: 7.5px; background-color: oklab(0.804634 0.0000367761 0.0000160933 / 0.1); padding-inline: 6px; padding-block: 2px; font-family: Consolas, &quot;Courier New&quot;, monospace; --tw-leading: 1; line-height: 1; font-size: 12px;">:8000</span>.</font></li><li class="text-size-chat leading-[calc(var(--codex-chat-font-size)+8px)] extension:leading-normal mb-1.5" style="box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; margin: 0px 0px 6px; padding: 0px; --tw-leading: 1.5; line-height: 1.5;"><font style="color: light-dark(rgb(187, 190, 191), rgb(255, 255, 255));"><span class="font-semibold" style="box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; font-weight: 600; --tw-font-weight: 600;">The worker does not sit behind nginx</span> and does not receive client HTTP requests.</font></li><li class="text-size-chat leading-[calc(var(--codex-chat-font-size)+8px)] extension:leading-normal mb-1.5" style="box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; margin: 0px 0px 6px; padding: 0px; --tw-leading: 1.5; line-height: 1.5;"><font style="color: light-dark(rgb(187, 190, 191), rgb(255, 255, 255));"><span class="font-semibold" style="box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; font-weight: 600; --tw-font-weight: 600;">FastAPI pushing to Redis, then worker consuming from Redis, then worker updating Postgres</span> is accurate.</font></li><li class="text-size-chat leading-[calc(var(--codex-chat-font-size)+8px)] extension:leading-normal mb-1.5" style="box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; margin: 0px 0px 6px; padding: 0px; --tw-leading: 1.5; line-height: 1.5;"><font style="color: light-dark(rgb(187, 190, 191), rgb(255, 255, 255));"><span class="font-semibold" style="box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; font-weight: 600; --tw-font-weight: 600;">The CI/CD pipeline arrows should be dashed or separated</span>, because CI/CD deploys/builds services; it is not part of the live request path.</font></li><li class="text-size-chat leading-[calc(var(--codex-chat-font-size)+8px)] extension:leading-normal mb-1.5" style="box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; margin: 0px 0px 6px; padding: 0px; --tw-leading: 1.5; line-height: 1.5;"><font style="color: light-dark(rgb(187, 190, 191), rgb(255, 255, 255));"><span class="font-semibold" style="box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; font-weight: 600; --tw-font-weight: 600;">Monitoring/logging is also an operations concern</span>, not application business flow. It watches/scrapes/receives logs from gateway, API, worker, and maybe databases.</font></li></ul>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="620" x="1050" y="660" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell ul.class: text-size-chat leading-[calc(var(--codex-chat-font-size)+8px)] extension:leading-normal mt-0 mb-4 list-disc pl-4
ul.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid light-dark(currentcolor, rgb(237, 237, 237)); margin: 0px 0px 16px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 16px; list-style: disc; --tw-leading: 1.5; line-height: 1.5; font-size: 13px; font-family: "Segoe WPC", "Segoe UI", sans-serif; text-align: start;

li.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid light-dark(currentcolor, rgb(237, 237, 237)); margin: 0px 0px 6px; padding: 0px; --tw-leading: 1.5; line-height: 1.5;
li.font: FastAPI should probably be labeled Uvicorn + FastAPI or matchmaking-api, because Uvicorn is the actual HTTP server listening on :8000.

li.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid light-dark(currentcolor, rgb(237, 237, 237)); margin: 0px 0px 6px; padding: 0px; --tw-leading: 1.5; line-height: 1.5;
li.font: The worker does not sit behind nginx and does not receive client HTTP requests.

li.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid light-dark(currentcolor, rgb(237, 237, 237)); margin: 0px 0px 6px; padding: 0px; --tw-leading: 1.5; line-height: 1.5;
li.font: FastAPI pushing to Redis, then worker consuming from Redis, then worker updating Postgres is accurate.

li.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid light-dark(currentcolor, rgb(237, 237, 237)); margin: 0px 0px 6px; padding: 0px; --tw-leading: 1.5; line-height: 1.5;
li.font: The CI/CD pipeline arrows should be dashed or separated, because CI/CD deploys/builds services; it is not part of the live request path.

li.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid light-dark(currentcolor, rgb(237, 237, 237)); margin: 0px 0px 6px; padding: 0px; --tw-leading: 1.5; line-height: 1.5;
li.font: Monitoring/logging is also an operations concern, not application business flow. It watches/scrapes/receives logs from gateway, API, worker, and maybe databases.

path.style: stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 118px; height: 1px; padding-top: 780px; margin-left: 261px;
